message:
Add MTTR badge to README (#11132)

Shows the Mean Time to Resolution (median time from issue filed to PR merged),
updated every 5 minutes by the hive monitoring system via a shields.io endpoint
badge backed by a GitHub Gist. Hover text explains the metric.
Color bands: green ≤60min, yellow ≤240min, red >240min.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@

 [![OpenSSF Scorecard](https://api.securityscorecards.dev/projects/github.com/kubestellar/console/badge)](https://securityscorecards.dev/viewer/?uri=github.com/kubestellar/console)
